title: Set up initial test suite for core functionality
description: Create basic test framework and write tests for critical paths in the codebase. Why: Ensure code quality and prevent regressions. Acceptance: Tests run successfully for main functions, coverage >70% on core modules.

title: Security audit of current codebase
description: Review code for security vulnerabilities, dependency issues, and best practices. Why: Protect against potential attacks and ensure compliance. Acceptance: Report generated with findings, critical issues addressed.

title: Research Vercel prospect for sales outreach
description: Analyze Vercel's business, recent announcements, and identify pain points where our product could help. Why: Prepare for effective sales outreach. Acceptance: Research summary with key insights and suggested talking points.

title: Research Netlify prospect for sales outreach
description: Analyze Netlify's business, recent announcements, and identify pain points where our product could help. Why: Prepare for effective sales outreach. Acceptance: Research summary with key insights and suggested talking points.

title: Create backlog management system
description: Build a system to manage tasks, track status, and assign work. Why: Improve team productivity and visibility. Acceptance: System allows CRUD operations on tasks, displays backlog, and integrates with current workflow.
